name: Patch Fitting Set (Floor Spring)
description: Heavy-duty floor spring with patch fittings for frameless glass doors. Supports doors up to 120kg. Includes top patch, bottom patch, and floor spring mechanism.

name: Spider Fitting Set (4-arm)
description: Stainless steel 4-arm spider fitting for structural glazing and curtain wall systems. 316 grade marine stainless. Includes routels and bolts.

name: Glass Door Handle (Pull-Push)
description: Premium D-shaped pull handle for glass doors. 600mm center-to-center. Satin finish stainless steel 304. Suitable for 8-12mm toughened glass.

name: Structural Silicone Sealant (600ml)
description: High-performance structural silicone for curtain wall and facade bonding. UV and weather resistant. 25+ year lifespan. Compliant with ASTM C1184.

name: Weather Sealant - Neutral Cure (280ml)
description: Neutral cure silicone sealant for weatherproofing glass joints. Safe for use with mirrors and coated glass. Mold-resistant formula for wet areas.

name: Glazing Tape (Double-sided)
description: High-tack VHB glazing tape for temporary and permanent glass fixing. 12mm width, 33m roll. Suitable for structural glazing support during silicone cure.

name: UPVC Window Frame (per running ft)
description: 5-chamber UPVC window profile with multi-point locking system. Available in white, wood grain, and custom colors. Energy efficient with thermal break.

name: Aluminium Sliding Frame System
description: Heavy-duty aluminium sliding door frame system. Supports glass panels up to 150kg. Includes track, rollers, and handle. Powder coated finish.

name: Shower Hinge Set (Wall-to-Glass)
description: Premium 90° wall-to-glass shower hinge set. Brass construction with chrome finish. Supports 8-12mm toughened glass panels up to 40kg per hinge.

name: Glass-to-Glass Connector
description: 180° glass-to-glass connector for shower enclosures. Stainless steel 304. Supports fixed and movable panel connection. For 8-10mm glass.

name: Spigot Base Plate (Stainless Steel)
description: Heavy-duty stainless steel 316 spigot for glass railing systems. Core-drilled or surface-mounted options. For 12-19mm laminated/toughened glass.

name: U-Channel Railing Profile (per meter)
description: Aluminium U-channel profile for frameless glass railings. Anodized finish. Includes rubber gaskets and wedges. For 12-21.52mm glass.

name: Glass Clamp Set (Round)
description: Round stainless steel glass clamp for 8-12mm glass. D-shape with flat back for wall/post mounting. Mirror polished finish.

name: Solar Control Film (Window Tint)
description: High-performance solar control window film. Rejects up to 79% solar heat. Reduces glare by 85%. UV protection 99%. Easy retrofit application.
